page.title: Category:All articles with bare URLs for citations

revision.comment: 1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Category:All_articles_with_bare_URLs_for_citations]]
attempts to make this page look somewhat better were made :/
1 revision imported: importing a single revision for context
fixing the uncategorized categories error
Adding [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Kk]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] to [[Category:kkk]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] to [[Category:improperly redirected categories]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
created overwrite category for malformed category page

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]

Bot: tidy & size tag (8 members)
Bot: tidy & size tag (3 members)
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
